data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. PAW QATAR is a capable type and proved too classy last time to win by half a length at Shepparton in a handy 22.46 beating Kraken Bluey. Yet to win out of this box but has been in the placings three times from six starts. Makes plenty of appeal if runs up to latest. 4. RUMBLING ROSE has a fair record and proved too classy last time to win by half a length at this track in a handy 22.51 beating Scott Vicious. Winner at her latest appearance in one of the quickest times on the card. Leading player again. 1. MAJOR WAIT was strongly supported last start but missed the frame when fifth (22.67), beaten 5 lengths. Solid formlines coming through her last run. One of the main contenders. 8. SODA SWAN returns here as an each-way chance.","runners":[3,4,1,8],"exclusive":false}
